.file-embed.background: rgb(209, 199, 189) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(219, 209, 198) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(219, 209, 198) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(219, 209, 198) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(219, 209, 198) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(219, 209, 198) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(219, 209, 198) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(219, 209, 198) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(219, 209, 198) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(219, 209, 198) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(219, 209, 198) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(219, 209, 198) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(209, 199, 189) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(209, 199, 189) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(209, 199, 189) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
